projectDescription: A Python library for building hierarchical multi-agent systems where specialized agents are orchestrated by a central supervisor using LangGraph.
keyFeatures: Create a supervisor agent to orchestrate multiple specialized sub-agents
Tool-based agent handoff mechanism for seamless communication between agents
Flexible message history management with full_history and last_message modes
Built-in support for streaming, short-term and long-term memory, and human-in-the-loop
Custom handoff tools with configurable names, descriptions, and task descriptions
Message forwarding to preserve response fidelity and save tokens
Parallel tool call control for OpenAI and Anthropic models
Support for both Graph API and Functional API agent workflows
publicApiSurface: create_supervisor(agents, *, model, tools, prompt, response_format, pre_model_hook, post_model_hook, parallel_tool_calls, state_schema, context_schema, output_mode, add_handoff_messages, handoff_tool_prefix, add_handoff_back_messages, supervisor_name, include_agent_name) -> StateGraph
create_handoff_tool(*, agent_name, name, description, add_handoff_messages) -> BaseTool
